title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Firstcry - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Firstcry - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Firstcry. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Digital Marketing Manager to strengthen our Mysuru-based team.

About Firstcry:
Firstcry is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Firstcry!
